## 10. Recommended next actions

1. Lengthen **14** short meta descriptions (mostly utilities/tool stubs).
2. Long venue titles (23) are expected for brand names — monitor SERP truncation only.
3. **GSC**: request indexing on `/guides/best-gyms-in-pattaya/`, `/guides/hotel-gym-pattaya/`, `/guides/boxing-kickboxing-gym-pattaya/`.
4. **Tier B guides** (700–1100w): deepen best-gyms, hotel-gym, boxing-kickboxing for stronger rankings.
5. Run Lighthouse mobile+desktop on `/`, `/search/`, one venue — see `FULL_PLATFORM_AUDIT_*_lh.md` if generated.
